# DEVOCEAN Lodge

> Small, family-run eco-lodge in Ponta do Ouro, far-southern Mozambique — 20 minutes from the South African border at Kosi Bay. Safari tents, a garden cottage, and a thatched chalet a short walk from the beach. Hosted by Sean. Known for world-class scuba diving, ethical dolphin swims, whale watching, and game safaris. Not a resort — warm, authentic, personal.

DEVOCEAN Lodge is operated by TERRAfrique LDA in Ponta do Ouro (Matutuine, Maputo Province, Mozambique), at coordinates -26.8420, 32.8850. Rates are billed in US dollars. Check-in from 14:00, check-out by 10:00. Free Wi-Fi. Pets not allowed.

## Accommodation

- [Safari Tent](https://devoceanlodge.com/safari.html): 12 m² canvas tent on a raised platform; twin/king beds, fan, mosquito mesh, power points, private terrace; shared hot-water ablutions.
- [Comfort Tent](https://devoceanlodge.com/comfort.html): Upgraded canvas tent with privacy walls; twin/king beds, fan, private terrace, en-suite bathroom under a thatched roof.
- [Garden Cottage](https://devoceanlodge.com/cottage.html): Queen bed, inverter air-conditioning (cool & heat), desk & dining table, private terrace, private bathroom in a thatched roundavel.
- [Thatched Chalet](https://devoceanlodge.com/chalet.html): Secluded chalet under palms; air-conditioning, twin/king beds, private bathroom, private terrace.

## Experiences & activities

- [Scuba Diving](https://devoceanlodge.com/experiences/diving): 20+ dive sites from 8 m to 48 m depth; bull sharks, tiger sharks, hammerheads, mantas, whale sharks (Oct–Mar), turtles, dolphins. World-class visibility.
- [Dolphin Swimming](https://devoceanlodge.com/experiences/dolphins): Ethical wild Indo-Pacific bottlenose dolphin encounters inside the Ponta do Ouro Partial Marine Reserve; operators follow strict passive-interaction guidelines.
- [Ocean Seafaris](https://devoceanlodge.com/experiences/seafari): Humpback whale watching (Jul–Nov), year-round dolphin encounters, seasonal whale shark sightings, reef snorkelling.
- [Game Safaris](https://devoceanlodge.com/experiences/safari): Maputo National Park (UNESCO World Heritage Site, 2025), ~45 min away; 450–500 coastal elephants, giraffes, zebras, hippos, crocodiles.
- [Beach & Deep-Sea Fishing](https://devoceanlodge.com/experiences/fishing): Marlin, sailfish, wahoo, yellowfin tuna, king mackerel offshore; kingfish, barracuda, pompano from the beach.
- [Surfing](https://devoceanlodge.com/experiences/surfing): Classic right-hand point break; rides of 100–200 m, up to 1 km in ideal conditions; boards and lessons available.
- [Lighthouse Walk](https://devoceanlodge.com/experiences/lighthouse): Hike to the old lighthouse for sweeping Indian Ocean panoramas; dolphin and turtle spotting en route.

## Location & getting there

Ponta do Ouro is in the far south of Mozambique, Maputo Province. The nearest border is Kosi Bay / Ponta do Ouro (KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa), open 08:00–17:00 daily, about 20 minutes from the lodge. The road into Ponta do Ouro village from the border is fully tarmacked — no 4x4 needed to reach the lodge. A 4x4 is only required for outlying areas such as Ponta Malongane, Ponta Mamoli, and Santa Maria. Fuel available in Manguzi (South Africa) and Ponta do Ouro. [View on map](https://maps.app.goo.gl/edhq5PGLLhGMh9rL6)

- [Book online](https://devoceanlodge.com/book-direct): Real-time availability, Stripe deposit. The reservations team personally confirms every booking.
- Email: info@devoceanlodge.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +258 84 418 2252
